title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 29 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 29 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 29 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 29/12/2021
DCE iron ore futures tight, an decrease only 1.92% throughout the day; the main contract closed 663. the quotation in the morning wasdecreased by 10 yuan/mt over yesterday. some traders were active to sell, steel mills purchased on demand, Today the overall market transaction atmosphere is batter.
